Bus Timings

Bus 26 Schedule Oud Metha Bus Station to Business Bay 2 Bus Station

July 10, 2025
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Looking to hop between Oud Metha and Business Bay without the hassle? Dubai Bus 26 has your back. This route is a real lifesaver, weaving through some of Dubai’s busiest spots.

Whether you’re a local heading to work or a tourist out to explore, Bus 26 is your ticket to ride. It runs pretty often and hits up all the major landmarks along the way. Trust me, it’s a godsend for anyone trying to navigate these bustling parts of town without getting stuck in traffic.

Route Name 26
Route Description Oud Metha Bus Station · 6 - Business Bay 2 Bus Station · 4
Total Distance Approximately 11 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 37 minutes
Operational Hours 06:00 to 20:40 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus 26

Bus 26 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The bus operates with the following schedule:

From Oud Metha Bus Station From Business Bay 2 Bus Station

06:25 06:15
06:40 06:35

Bus 26 Timetable

For a detailed timetable, please refer to the RTA website or follow this link for Bus 26 Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

The fare for riding Bus 26 varies depending on the distance traveled. Typically, ticket prices are AED 3, making it an affordable option for daily commuters and occasional travelers. The cost-effectiveness of this route makes it a practical choice for those looking to navigate between Oud Metha and Business Bay without breaking the bank.

Bus Booking

The app also provides real-time updates and route information, helping travelers navigate their journey more effectively.

Bus Route

Bus 26 runs between Oud Metha Bus Station · 6 and Business Bay 2 Bus Station · 4, covering a range of notable stops along its route. The bus travels through:

  1. Oud Metha Bus Station · 6

  2. Umm Hurair, Road, 2

  3. Oud Metha Metro · 1

  4. Oud Metha Road

  5. Oud Metha Road, 2

  6. Wafi City

  7. Wasl Club

  8. Coral Tower

  9. Canal View Hotel Apartments

  10. Bay Square

  11. Marquise Square Tower

  12. Lake Central Tower

  13. 8 Boulevard Walk Tower

  14. East Height Towers Entrance G

  1. Lillian Tower

  2. XL Tower

  3. U BORA Tower

  4. Volante Dubai Tower

  5. Mayfair Residency

  6. Fairview Residency

  7. Clayton Residency

  8. Business Bay 2 Bus Station · 4

Bus 26 Station Overview

Oud Metha Bus Station · 6

Oud Metha Bus Station · 6 is a well-connected transit point situated in the Oud Metha area, serving as a crucial hub for local and intercity travel. This station offers essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates. Its strategic location in a bustling residential and commercial district ensures easy access to nearby businesses, schools, and healthcare facilities. The station plays a key role in facilitating efficient transportation within the Oud Metha area and beyond.

Intersection at 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop

The 8 Boulevard Walk Tower 1 Bus Stop is a key transit point located near the vibrant Boulevard area. The station is well-equipped with essential amenities such as sheltered waiting areas and real-time schedule updates.

Its strategic location in a bustling part of the city ensures convenient access to nearby attractions, residential areas, and commercial centers. The intersection of these bus routes at this stop facilitates seamless connections for passengers traveling to various destinations across the city.

Business Bay 2 Bus Station · 4

The station is essential for commuters and professionals traveling within the Business Bay area, supporting seamless connectivity to key destinations across Dubai.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

Bus 26 passes by several notable destinations and attractions in Dubai: 1.

  1. Canal View Hotel Apartments: Located in the Business Bay area, this hotel offers views of Dubai’s waterways and is close to various attractions.

  2. Bay Square: A vibrant mixed-use development in Business Bay, known for its restaurants, shops, and business facilities.

  3. Marquise Square Tower: A prominent high-rise in Business Bay offering luxury apartments and office spaces.

  4. Lake Central Tower: An office and residential tower located in the heart of Business Bay, known for its modern design and amenities.

  5. 8 Boulevard Walk Tower: A residential tower that offers easy access to the surrounding Business Bay area and its attractions.

These stops provide convenient access to Dubai’s bustling commercial districts, shopping centers, and scenic views.

Journey Experience

Taking the bus on route 26 from Oud Metha Bus Station to Business Bay 2 Bus Station offers a long yet fascinating journey through the heart of Dubai.

The journey continues through the dynamic Business Bay district, home to iconic skyscrapers and the bustling Dubai Canal.

Travelling with Careem

The journey offers a comfortable and convenient option, with prices ranging between AED 40 and AED 48. Whether you’re heading to the vibrant Business Bay area or exploring the surrounding landmarks, Careem provides an efficient way to reach your destination.

By understanding the routes, timings, and ticketing information, passengers can make the most of their travel on Bus 26, whether commuting to work or exploring Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods. With regular services and affordable fares, Bus 26 ensures that getting around Dubai is both efficient and economical.
